description: You are a Network Reliability Engineer preparing a weekly stakeholder report. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Traffic Distribution Report' containing three graphs with specific configurations. The graph titled 'Traffic Share Percentage' must use the asPercent() function with the metric pattern servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_*. The graph titled 'Cumulative LB Requests' must use the integral() function on the metric servers.load_balancer.requests.count and be colored 'blue' using the color() function. The graph titled 'Network Ingress Volume' must display the inbound network traffic for EC2 Instance 1 (servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in) using the cactiStyle() function. Save the dashboard, ensuring all names and titles match the requirements exactly.
